svg.font-family: -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Dashboard "Latest digest" (LIVE) report card (wireframe)
svg.desc: Wireframe of the per-customer "AI analyses" dashboard section. Under the customer name "Acme Corp" the "Latest digest" card shows the LIVE report tier badge "AI · CRITICAL"; the badge links to the aimer-web LIVE report page. The card renders only when the LIVE summary resolves to a CRITICAL or HIGH tier; a negative result hides the card with no placeholder.
svg.text: The badge links to the aimer-web LIVE report (latest minute-cadence digest). Hidden when below CRITICAL/HIGH.
